response.justification: The candidate has extensive experience in software development, including C/C++ and embedded systems, but lacks direct experience with Linux kernel modification, networking switch technologies, or security protocols like MACsec and 802.1X. Proficiency in C is demonstrated, but most recent roles focus on higher-level languages (TypeScript, Python), and there is no evidence of Japanese language proficiency. Embedded networking experience is limited to general embedded systems, not LAN-switch products.
strengths: Strong C/C++ and embedded systems experience (e.g., National Instruments, robotic arms)
Proven ability to work in diverse tech stacks and learn new technologies quickly
Demonstrated expertise in low-latency systems and real-time applications
concerns: No direct experience with Linux kernel modification or embedded networking switch products
Lacks proficiency in required security technologies (MACsec, 802.1X) and Japanese language
Most recent roles focus on higher-level languages (TypeScript, Node.js) rather than C for embedded systems

key_factors.factor: C programming and embedded systems experience
Relevant security and networking experience (MACsec, 802.1X, kernel modification)
